title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. VLCC Rates Explode Higher as the Worst-Case Scenario becomes Reality - The global oil market is currently experiencing an unprecedented disruption in supply flows.
